news.headline: Waterdrop Inc. reported Q4 net profit of RMB99.6 million, FYP of RMB1,897.9 million, and cash dividend of US$7.3 million. Profitability growth and impressive operational stats for FY2024. Cash position at RMB3,670.3 million. ADS repurchase totaling 52.1 million shares. Dividend of US$0.02 per ADS or US$0.002 per share approved.
news.summary: Waterdrop Inc. reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024, with net profit reaching RMB99.6 million (US$13.6 million), a 68.7% increase year-over-year. They saw substantial growth in insurance business, with first-year premiums at RMB1,897.9 million (US$260.0 million), a 24.5% increase. Additionally, around 470 million people contributed RMB67.5 billion through Waterdrop Medical Crowdfunding. The company had enrolled 10,395 patients in 1,212 clinical trial programs. Waterdrop also announced a cash dividend of US$7.3 million. Their cash position as of December 31, 2024, was RMB3,670.3 million (US$502.8 million). The company had repurchased approximately 52.1 million ADSs from the market. Looking ahead to 2025, Waterdrop aims to accelerate growth leveraging technology to enhance competitiveness.

news.headline: Atomiq Inc., subsidiary of Kronos Advanced Technologies, receives USPTO Notice of Allowance for Patent Application 17/926,508 - innovative nuclear-powered battery technology poised to revolutionize renewable energy solutions.
news.summary: A groundbreaking nuclear-powered battery technology is poised to transform renewable energy solutions. This innovative technology integrates nuclear power with battery storage systems, offering a reliable and sustainable energy source. With an impressive energy storage capacity of [specific number] megawatt-hours, this advanced system has the potential to revolutionize the renewable energy sector. By combining the efficiency of nuclear power with the flexibility of battery storage, this technology promises to enhance energy resilience and reduce reliance on traditional fossil fuels. This innovation represents a significant step towards achieving a greener and more sustainable future in the energy industry.

news.headline: Epson promotes creativity during National Craft Month with discounts on EcoTank printers. (Characters: 81)
news.summary: Epson, based in Los Alamitos, California, announced on March 12, 2025, their focus on content creators by offering discounted pricing for EcoTank Photo Cartridge-Free Supertank Printers. This move aligns with the upcoming spring season, known for inspiring creativity with its vibrant atmosphere. The promotion aims to support creators by providing cost-effective printing solutions. Be sure to take advantage of this offer while enjoying the longer days and heightened creative energy that spring brings.

news.headline: Laopu's IPO frenzy sparks 1,600% rally in Hong Kong tracker shows.
TotalEnergies and RWE aim to decarbonize Leuna Refinery in Germany by supplying 30,000 tons of green hydrogen yearly from 2030.
news.summary: Paris - TotalEnergies is taking significant steps towards decarbonizing hydrogen in its European refineries by signing a deal with RWE to provide 30,000 tons of green hydrogen annually to the German Leuna refinery for a duration of fifteen years starting in 2030. The green hydrogen, generated by a 300 MW electrolyzer set up and managed by RWE in Lingen, will be locally stored. A 600 km pipeline will be used for the transportation of green hydrogen from production to the refinery.

news.headline: US stocks are likely to be influenced by inflation data as it prints today, causing volatility in the market.
Global companies pledge historic support for nuclear energy at CERAWeek 2025 in Houston, emphasizing its role in improving energy security and resilience.
news.summary: During CERAWeek 2025 in Houston, a coalition of prominent companies made history by unveiling a groundbreaking cross-sector commitment highlighting the vital importance of nuclear energy in bolstering energy security and resilience, as well as in delivering uninterrupted clean power. This alliance, consisting of key industry players, marks a significant milestone in the sector's evolution.

news.headline: BitIRA releases 7th Annual Crypto Tax Q&A, addressing latest cryptocurrency tax issues for investors.
news.summary: In Burbank, California on March 12, 2025, BitIRA, known as the pioneer in Bitcoin IRAs, launched its 7th Annual Crypto Tax Q&A session. The report aims to address current cryptocurrency tax concerns. BitIRA collected key tax inquiries from crypto investors and worked with prominent experts to shed light on the evolving tax landscape.

news.headline: Ninjas in Pyjamas renews partnership with Red Bull, a legendary esports org founded in Sweden in 2000. Characters: 109
news.summary: In Stockholm on March 12, 2025, Ninjas in Pyjamas (NIP), a renowned esports organization formed in Sweden in 2000 and a subsidiary of NIP Group (Nasdaq: NIPG), has confirmed the extension of their collaboration with Red Bull, a well-known energy drink brand. The partnership, established in November 2022, continues to strengthen the alliance between the two, contributing to the growth and success of NIP within the competitive gaming industry.

news.headline: Massive cargo ship stuck in Suez Canal symbolizes pandemic worries as global trade halts. #EverGiven #SuezBlockage
news.summary: Despite numerous attempts to move it, the Ever Given remained stuck, serving as a representation of the ongoing anxiety brought about by the Covid-19 pandemic, now entering its second year.

news.headline: The upcoming U.S. inflation report is anticipated to reveal enduringly high prices in February, posing a dilemma for the Fed.
news.summary: Economic experts are preparing for heightened inflation and a deceleration in growth, presenting a difficulty for the Federal Reserve. This situation could involve a rise in consumer prices and potential stagnation in economic expansion. It is anticipated that the pressures on prices will continue to increase, while growth may face constraints. This scenario presents a significant hurdle for the Federal Reserve as it grapples with balancing inflation and economic progress.

news.headline: Sell your home April 13-19 to make $4,800 more, sell 9 days faster, with 13.2% less competition.
news.summary: In the bustling real estate market of Austin, Texas, sellers looking to list their homes between April 13 and 19 have the opportunity to significantly boost their profits. On average, these sellers could make an additional $4,800, sell their property nine days quicker, and face 13.2% less competition compared to an average week. Timing is crucial in this competitive market, and taking advantage of this window could greatly benefit those looking to sell their homes.

news.headline: ChemPoint launches IngredientPoint digital platform to revolutionize supplier connections in industries.
news.summary: ChemPoint, a Bellevue-based company known for its decades-long focus on digital strategies, has recently launched IngredientPoint with the goal of revolutionizing the connection between specialty suppliers and fast-paced markets. The initiative was officially announced on March 12, 2025. ChemPoint, a subsidiary of Univar Solutions LLC, is at the forefront of this innovative move within the industry.

news.headline: HFS Research recognizes Brillio as an enterprise innovator in generative enterprise services, delivering industry-specific GenAI solutions at scale.
news.summary: Recently released by HFS Horizons, a report spotlighted Brillio’s expertise in providing industry-tailored GenAI solutions with a strong customer focus at a large scale. Hailing from Dallas, this leading digital transformation company was acknowledged for its capabilities in this regard. The report was unveiled on March 12, 2025, shedding light on Brillio’s success in catering to specific industries and delivering customer-centric solutions using cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: 63% of executives see Agentic AI taking 3-7 years for ROI, while 50% won't cut jobs due to it in 2 years.
news.summary: In a recent survey conducted by NLX, an AI platform specializing in advanced conversational experiences for top brands, it was revealed that 50% of companies do not plan to decrease their workforce due to the implementation of Agentic AI in the next two years. This highlights a level of confidence in the technology's capabilities to enhance operations without significant job reduction. The survey provides insights into the industry's approach towards AI integration, suggesting that organizations are looking to leverage AI's benefits while minimizing the impact on employment numbers.

news.headline: 2025 QS World University Rankings show top universities in 55 subjects. 21,000 academic offerings compared from 1700 institutions.
news.summary: The latest rankings from QS Quacquarelli Symonds, a leading global higher education organization, have unveiled the top universities in 55 subjects. This 15th edition of the QS World University Rankings by Subject evaluated over 21,000 academic programs from over 1,700 institutions worldwide. The rankings offer valuable insights into the best performing universities in various fields of study.

news.headline: BMW Art Car Collection marks 50 years, with 20 artists creating "rolling sculptures" since 1975..globally celebrated.
news.summary: In Munich on March 12, 2025, it was reported that over the course of 50 years since 1975, there have been a total of 20 well-known global artists who have contributed to the creation of BMW Art Cars. These unique "rolling sculptures," ranging from the inaugural Art Car by Alexander Calder to the most recent piece by Julie Mehretu, showcase a diverse representation of art history from the last five decades.

news.headline: Vivace Therapeutics raises $35M in Series D financing for cancer drug targeting Hippo Pathway supported by RA Capital Management and existing investors.
news.summary: RA Capital Management has taken the lead in providing financing, along with other existing investors Canaan Partners and Cenova Capital, for VT3989. This unique TEAD Autopalmitoylation Inhibitor is currently the only one with reported compelling clinical efficacy data. Its promising performance showcases a best-in-class profile. The funding secured aims to support further development and expansion of this innovative product.

Alongside this substantial investment, MEXC has also acquired $20 million worth...

SkylineDx confirms enhanced risk stratification for sentinel lymph node biopsy in head and neck melanoma with new study.

news.headline: Supreme Court of Virginia to review Appian's petition to reinstate $2.036 billion verdict against Pegasystems, Inc.

The petition highlighted four specific mistakes made by the Court of Appeals during the case.

news.headline: Target Circle Week from March 23-29 offers up to 40% savings on spring essentials. Target Circle 360 members get early access. Membership at 50% off.
news.summary: This week, Target Circle is featuring exclusive discounts on spring must-haves including home goods, fashion items, beauty products, and more. Excitingly, Target Circle 360 members have the opportunity to access top deals 24 hours in advance. For a short period, individuals can join Target Circle 360 at a 50% discount, gaining access to additional benefits.

news.headline: American Red Cross commemorates its donors during Red Cross Month, highlighting their crucial support amid rising need for assistance.
news.summary: In March 2025, the American Red Cross is commemorating its annual Red Cross Month by recognizing the vital contributions of donors enabling its mission. The organization's capability to assist in times of crisis is largely due to the steadfast support from generous individuals.

news.headline: Research by Hopelab and Born This Way Fdn shows LGBTQ+ youth rely on online spaces for identity exploration and peer support.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by Hopelab and Born This Way Foundation in San Francisco revealed insights into how LGBTQ+ youth utilize online platforms to form connections, seek support, and cultivate meaningful relationships. The report, titled "Without It, I...", examines the experiences of young LGBTQ+ individuals and their interactions within digital communities. The research sheds light on the importance of these online spaces in facilitating identity exploration and fostering lasting friendships among this demographic. This study, conducted in 2025, underscores the significance of virtual networks for LGBTQ+ youth, highlighting their role in providing a sense of belonging and understanding.

news.headline: Violife® introduces new coffee creamers with lentil protein formula for a creamy indulgence. #1 dairy free cheese brand in US.
news.summary: Violife® has introduced an innovative coffee creamer that sets a new standard for dairy-free indulgence. Their breakthrough product features a special lentil protein formula that ensures a rich, creamy texture that blends perfectly with every sip. Based in Hackensack, N.J., the company announced this groundbreaking item on March 12, 2025. Violife® is recognized as the top dairy-free cheese brand in the U.S., further solidifying its position as an industry leader in plant-based alternatives.

news.headline: Appcast webinar by Chief Economist on U.S. political & economic shifts' impact on recruiting in 2025.
news.summary: Andrew Flowers, Chief Economist at Appcast, will present a detailed examination of the shifts within the U.S. federal government and their potential effects on recruitment in the upcoming year. The event is set to take place in Lebanon, New Hampshire on March 12, 2025. Appcast, a prominent recruitment marketing platform, will be the host for this important analysis.

news.headline: Global broadband leaders recognized in Hong Kong for contributions to intelligent networks, enhancing user experience. Broadband Forum Awards presented at Spring Member Meeting.
news.summary: In Hong Kong, the Broadband Forum acknowledged industry leaders who have made significant contributions to enhancing broadband networks to be more intelligent and user-centric in the past year. The prestigious "Broadband Forum Awards" were handed out during the Forum’s Spring Member Meeting. The recipients were lauded for their dedication and influential guidance that propelled the broadband industry, fostered industry engagement, and advocated for novel advancements.

When asked about US tariffs, Swiss Government: We are closely monitoring these potential measures and analyzing the potential consequences for the Swiss economy.
WNS appoints Sylvie Ouziel to Board of Directors effective April 1, 2025.
news.summary: In a recent update from New York, London, and Mumbai, WNS unveiled the addition of Sylvie Ouziel to their Board of Directors, a change scheduled to take effect on April 1, 2025.

news.headline: Octadecanamide Market to grow at a 5.4% CAGR, reach USD 624.0 million by 2035. North America to hold 35% market share.
news.summary: The global Octadecanamide Market was valued at USD 350.0 million in 2024 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 5.4%, reaching USD 624.0 million by 2035. This growth is attributed to industries focusing on sustainability, with octadecanamide being sourced from natural materials and used in various applications like cosmetics, lubricants, and plastics. The United States is a key market due to regulatory frameworks favoring non-toxic components. North America is estimated to hold a 35% market share in 2035, with an absolute $ opportunity of USD 89.8 million. The market created a total $255.2 million opportunity between 2025 and 2035. This growth is driven by the demand for eco-friendly products and the performance enhancement provided by octadecanamide in automotive and industrial sectors.

news.headline: Nigeria embraces crypto innovation while focusing on responsible regulation to protect citizens. Crypto market thrives in Nigeria with over 200 million population showing keen interest. Nigeria shifts towards balanced regulation under President Tinubu's leadership. Embracing blockchain beyond crypto trading for governance and service improvements. Collaborative approach with global best practices for effective regulation and education. Nigeria aims for secure, transparent, and inclusive crypto ecosystem for economic growth and empowerment. Nigeria welcomes crypto innovation but prioritizes secure and responsible adoption.
news.summary: In a recent opinion article by Mohammed Idris, the Minister of Information of Nigeria, he discusses the rise of cryptocurrency adoption in Nigeria. With a population of over 200 million people, Nigeria has emerged as one of the most active crypto markets globally. Despite challenges such as regulatory concerns and misuse of digital assets, Nigeria aims to foster an inclusive digital asset ecosystem. The country is moving towards balanced regulation under the administration of President Bola Ahmed Tinubu to ensure innovation, market integrity, and consumer protection. Nigeria recognizes the benefits of cryptocurrencies for financial inclusion, cross-border payments, and access to global markets, but also acknowledges the need to address issues like fraud and money laundering. The government sees blockchain technology as a tool for governance, transparency, and service delivery in areas such as land registries and supply chain monitoring. Nigeria invites collaboration with global stakeholders to create a transparent and predictable environment for businesses, emphasizing the importance of effective regulation, education, and international cooperation for responsible crypto adoption. Nigeria aims to leverage digital assets and blockchain for economic growth, job creation, and financial empowerment, emphasizing the need for a secure, transparent, and inclusive framework for innovation.

news.headline: US Rep. Emmer pushes pro-stablecoin laws, slams CBDCs at House hearing. Warns of privacy risks with CBDCs. Emmer reintroduced CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act in House, wants Congress approval for US CBDC launch. Paxos CEO calls for consistent stablecoin regulations globally. Report highlights $134M spent by crypto firms on 2024 US elections.
news.summary: US Representative Tom Emmer spoke in favor of pro-stablecoin legislation in a House Financial Services Committee hearing on March 11, asserting that central bank digital currencies (CBDCs) threaten American values. Emmer reintroduced the CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act on March 6 to prevent the unauthorized launch of a US CBDC. President Trump had previously signed an executive order on Jan. 23 prohibiting CBDC issuance. Paxos CEO Charles Cascarilla advocated for consistent stablecoin regulations globally to prevent regulatory arbitrage. Emmer highlighted privacy risks of CBDCs and emphasized the need for pro-stablecoin legislation. A report by the Center for Political Accountability flagged concerns about crypto companies' political influence, with $134 million spent on the 2024 US elections.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price showing signs of bullish momentum, up 5% to $83,786 from $76,450 low. Technical indicators suggest a potential rise to $89k.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) has surged 5% in the past 24 hours, rising from $76,450 to $83,786 on March 12. The cryptocurrency has maintained a position above its 50-weekly exponential moving average since August 2023, indicating a bullish trend. Bullish divergences have been observed across different time frames, suggesting a reversal of the bearish trend. BTC may rally to $89,000 if it breaks above the neckline at $83,800, with support near $78,500. The liquidation heatmap shows over $250 million in leveraged positions between $85,000 and $87,000, indicating a potential rally in the coming days. Analysts predict consolidation near $86,000-$88,000 before a drop to form new price lows in the future.

news.headline: Bitcoin whales hint at market rebound towards $80K with decreasing sell-side pressure from Binance inflows cooling. Interesting insights on whale activity and potential market movements. Hesitant buyers remain as larger investors accumulate at modest rates.
news.summary: Bitcoin whales are increasing their buying activity at $80,000 per BTC while smaller investors are staying away due to market panic. Data from CryptoQuant suggests that sell-side pressure from Binance whales is cooling down, indicating a potential market rebound. The top 10 largest inflows to Binance attributed to whales have declined since mid-January when BTC hit its latest all-time highs. Despite this, overall appetite for BTC exposure remains low. Glassnode's analytics show lackluster demand at current prices, with short-term holders (STHs) now holding coins for shorter durations at lower cost bases. This suggests macro uncertainty has spooked demand, leading to net capital outflows and a cautious market environment. This shift may increase the probability of further sell pressure and a prolonged correction in the Bitcoin market.

news.headline: BTC hit $83,700 on Mar 12 but market sentiment remains uncertain. Outflows exceed $1.5B, weakening demand. Apparent demand at -93,700 BTC. Bearish signals hint at possible $68,400 price level.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) surged to $83,700 on March 12 after hitting a low of $76,600 on March 11, but struggles at $84,000 raised concerns about a potential further drop. Spot Bitcoin ETF outflows exceeded $1.5 billion in the last two weeks, impacting prices negatively. Apparent demand for Bitcoin decreased sharply from late 2024, currently at -93,700 BTC, raising fears of a price dip. Valuation metrics suggest a deeper correction may be on the horizon. Technical analysis indicates BTC might drop further towards $68,400 if critical support levels fail. If support at $75,000-$78,000 doesn't hold, BTC could plummet to $63,000. Note: Article does not provide investment advice.

news.headline: Rocket Lab buys controlling stake in Mynaric AG for $75 million, potentially $150 million with earn-out tied to revenue targets. Deal subject to regulatory approvals and restructuring.
news.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (NASDAQ:RKLB) announced on Tuesday that they have agreed to a non-binding term sheet with specific lenders for the acquisition of a majority stake in Mynaric AG. The deal involves Rocket Lab acquiring 100% of Mynaric for an initial payment of $75 million, which can be made in cash or Rocket Lab stock. There is also a potential earn-out of up to $75 million based on future revenue goals. The purchase price could increase if additional cash is invested in Mynaric by the Lenders or their associates post-restructuring, potentially lowering the earn-out amount. The acquisition is contingent on regulatory approvals and the finalization of Mynaric's ongoing StaRUG restructuring in accordance with German law. Detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: The Bank of England has appointed Sarah John, the bank’s current chief cashier as its new chief operating officer - Statement.
Nokia and Canal+ Telecom are expanding and automating fiber network to bring broadband access to the Caribbean.
news.summary: Nokia and Canal+ Telecom have joined forces to enhance and streamline the fiber network in the Caribbean region, ensuring improved broadband connectivity. This collaboration aims to extend high-speed internet access to more residents in the Caribbean. By leveraging Nokia's cutting-edge technology, the partners plan to automate the network infrastructure for greater efficiency. This initiative will significantly benefit a substantial number of people in the Caribbean, providing them with the opportunity to experience faster and more reliable internet connections.

news.headline: CLEAR opens new enrollment locations in Simon® Malls for TSA PreCheck enrollment and renewals, providing convenience to consumers.
news.summary: New enrollment centers are now available for consumers seeking to enroll or renew in TSA PreCheck, offering a convenient option for individuals. This expansion provides additional locations for individuals to complete the process, with a total of [number] enrollment centers now in operation. The new centers aim to improve accessibility and efficiency for consumers looking to enroll in TSA PreCheck.

news.headline: US stock futures rise ahead of key inflation report, with annual inflation expected to drop to 2.9%. Markets unsettled by tariff changes. Treasury yields at 4.27% for 10-year and 3.94% for 2-year, with 97% chance Fed will keep rates unchanged in March. Major indices and ETFs see premarket gains.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures surged after a volatile Tuesday, with all four benchmark indices showing gains in premarket trading. Economists forecast a decrease in annual February inflation to 2.9%, breaking a four-month increase trend, while monthly price growth and core inflation are expected to slow down. President Trump's abrupt decision reversal on Canadian tariffs contributed to market unsettlement. The 10-year Treasury yield was at 4.27%, with a 97% chance of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates steady for the March meeting. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF rose in premarket, with sectors like industrials, consumer staples, health care, and real estate falling over 1% the previous day. Small business optimism dipped, while the labor market remained robust with declining layoffs.

news.headline: VNET Group, Inc. reports unaudited financial results for Q4 2024 with total net revenues of RMB2.25 billion. Total net revenues for FY 2024 reached RMB8.26 billion, indicating a 11.4% growth. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 2024 was RMB721.3 million. Net income for FY 2024 was RMB248.4 million. Conference call scheduled for further details.
news.summary: VNET Group, Inc., a prominent internet data center services provider in China, reported unaudited financial results for Q4 and FY 2024. In Q4, total net revenues rose by 18.3% to RMB2.25 billion; IDC business revenues increased by 28.3% to RMB1.63 billion driven by wholesale revenues' 125.4% growth. Adjusted EBITDA rose by 63.8% to RMB721.3 million. For FY 2024, total net revenues increased by 11.4% to RMB8.26 billion; IDC business revenues surged by 16.1% to RMB5.78 billion. Adjusted EBITDA increased by 19.1% to RMB2.43 billion. Net income for 2024 was RMB248.4 million compared to a net loss of RMB2.60 billion in 2023. VNET aims for 10-13% revenue growth and adjusted EBITDA of RMB2.7-2.76 billion in 2025. These figures indicate VNET's optimism for market growth. The financial details highlight VNET's strong financial performance and growth prospects.

news.headline: $100B in trades produced by JPMorgan's Quant-Cloning Factory, says report.
Shift Bioscience appoints Jill Reckless, Ph.D, as Translation Advisor and Laurence Reid, Ph.D., as Non-Executive Director, to advance rejuvenation therapeutics pipeline.
news.summary: In Cambridge, England, Shift Bioscience unveiled their latest additions to the team, with the appointment of Jill Reckless, Ph.D., as Translation Advisor and Laurence Reid, Ph.D., as Non-Executive Director. Shift Bioscience, a biotech firm leveraging an AI-powered virtual cell in combatting age-related illnesses, aims to benefit from the expertise of Jill and Laurence in fostering a strong product translation strategy and boosting business development efforts. These appointments signify a strategic move by the company to make the most of its early success and advance its novel pipeline of treatments.

news.summary: Prior to the implementation of the new tariffs, the industry had concerns regarding price fluctuations following President Trump's stance against a significant merger within the steel sector.

news.headline: Eldridge provides £96.7M loan to Morar Care Group for UK care home developments with Simply UK.

This collaboration with Simply UK, a prominent care home developer in Glasgow, aims to aid in refinancing and building high-end care facilities in Scotland and South East England. With a focus on real estate credit investments, Eldridge operates in the US, UK, and Europe, targeting various opportunities like construction, bridge, and speculative projects.

news.headline: Kremlin: We need to hear from Waltz and Rubio before we will comment on acceptability of a ceasefire for Russia.
Veros introduces ValuSTREAM, an optimized AVM cascade, ensuring accurate valuations for lenders via independent testing.
news.summary: Veros, based in Santa Ana, California, has introduced ValuSTREAM, a refined automated valuation model (AVM) cascade. This new system has undergone independent testing to guarantee accurate and location-specific property valuations for lenders. ValuSTREAM aims to provide reliable assessments to assist in the lending process.
